command_checks: if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then cmake -S . -B build/lab-policy -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/lab-policy -j; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make -n >/dev/null; else echo 'Missing CMakeLists.txt or Makefile' >&2; exit 1; fi
if command -v cppcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then cppcheck --enable=warning,style,performance,portability --error-exitcode=1 src include tests; else echo 'cppcheck not installed; skipping'; fi
if command -v arm-none-eabi-gcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then arm-none-eabi-gcc --version >/dev/null; else echo 'arm-none-eabi-gcc not installed; skipping MCU compiler check'; fi
